title: bertya opponens
intro: Bertya opponens, also known as the 'thornless stinkwood', is a species of plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, native to Australia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Bertya opponens include its ability to aid in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce pain and inflammation. Bertya opponens is typically prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, or the application of its leaves as a poultice.
